description_long: This object features a stylized, tree-like stem with three large, rounded mushroom caps at the top, each cap colored a vibrant pink. The stem is a smooth, light tan color and splits into three branches, each supporting a cap. The caps are bulbous and slightly asymmetrical, giving a whimsical, cartoonish appearance. The surface of the caps appears matte and smooth, with no visible gills or textural details. The object is solid and upright, with a broad base for stability. Its playful design and bright colors make it suitable for decorative use in parks, playgrounds, or themed urban spaces.
description: A whimsical mushroom with a tan, tree-like stem and three large, smooth pink caps. The design is playful and stylized, ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pink caps and the full split of the tan stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the caps and the curvature of the stem.
description_view_2: Rear view with all three caps visible, showing the back split of the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the largest cap and the stem's lean.
